recalls.Description: Academy Sports + Outdoors is recalling its Magellan-branded Odyssey Rocker Chairs, identified by date codes 07/2025 and 08/2025. These folding chairs, available in charcoal, navy, olive green, and teal, were sold between September 2025 and October 2025. When folded, they measure approximately 25.2" long, 5.5" deep, and 37.4" high, while the open dimensions are about 25.4" long, 25.2" deep, and 37.4" high. Each chair features a metal frame, a mesh backrest, a carrying handle, and a side drink holder, with the Magellan Outdoors logo displayed on the backrest. Only chairs manufactured in July and August 2025 are affected by this recall.
recalls.Title: Recall of Magellan Odyssey Rocker Chairs by Academy Sports + Outdoors Due to Injury Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Academy Sports + Outdoors at 888-922-2336 from 7 a.m. to 10 p.m. CT, via email at customerservice@academy.com, or visit www.academy.com/product-recalls for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Academy Magellan Odyssey Rocker Chair - charcoal
Recalled Academy Magellan Odyssey Rocker Chair – olive green
Recalled Academy Magellan Odyssey Rocker Chair - navy
Recalled Academy Magellan Odyssey Rocker Chair - teal
"ACADEMY, LTD," "177296" and the manufacture date 07/2025 or 08/2025 are printed on the tracking label sewn onto the arm of the chair

Injuries.Name: Academy Sports + Outdoors has received one report of the chair's legs breaking. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Academy Sports + Outdoors locations across the nation and online at academy.com from September 2025 to October 2025 for approximately $50.

Importers.Name: Academy Ltd., dba Academy Sports + Outdoors, of Katy, Texas

Hazards.Name: Risk of injury and falls due to potential leg breakage

Remedies.Name: Stop using the chairs immediately and return them to any Academy Sports + Outdoors location for a full refund. Customers can also arrange for a free mail return through Academy's Customer Care.

recalls.metaDescription: Academy Sports + Outdoors recalls Magellan Odyssey Rocker Chairs due to injury risks. Stop using them and return for a refund.
